justification: The diff correctly updates Spring Boot to 3.3.x and Java to 21, migrating javax.validation to jakarta.validation and fixing deprecated Spring Security APIs (authorizeHttpRequests). However, it introduces spurious churn by removing unused imports (java.util.Optional, org.antlr.v4.runtime.misc.NotNull) and changing test assertions (assertEquals vs assertTrue) without clear necessity, and fails to leverage any Java 21 specific idioms (records, pattern matching, etc.).
